betterpingdisplay.configuration.autoColo: Whether to color player's ping based on their latency.  E.g, low latency = green, high latency = red
betterpingdisplay.configuration.renderPi: Whether to also render the default Minecraft ping bars.
betterpingdisplay.configuration.textColo: The ping text color to use. Only works whens "autoColorPingText" is false.
betterpingdisplay.configuration.textForm: The format string for ping text. Must include a "%d", which will be replaced dynamically by the actual ping value.
betterpingdisplay.configuration.title: Better Ping Display Settings
betterpingdisplay.settings.autoColorPing: Whether to color player's ping based on their latency.  E.g, low latency = green, high latency = red
betterpingdisplay.settings.pingTextColor: The ping text color to use. Only works whens "autoColorPingText" is false.
betterpingdisplay.settings.pingTextForma: The format string for ping text. Must include a "%d", which will be replaced dynamically by the actual ping value.
betterpingdisplay.settings.renderPingBar: Whether to also render the default Minecraft ping bars.
betterpingdisplay.settings.title: Better Ping Display Settings
